narrative:
category_one_description: [ENTITY_REDACTED] seeks proposals for fully managed Dedicated Internet Access (DIA) delivered via fiber to four school locations, with scalable symmetrical bandwidth of approximately 5 Gbps to 10 Gbps. Proposals must include all recurring and non-recurring costs, special construction if required, network electronics necessary to deliver service, and service level agreements ensuring reliable, end-to-end connectivity compliant with E-Rate rules.
service_type: Data Transmission and/or Internet Access
service_category: Category 1
function: Internet Access and Data Transmission Service
minimum_capacity: 5120.00 Mbps
maximum_capacity: 10240.00 Mbps
installation_initial: True
form_nickname: [ENTITY_REDACTED] FY 2026 C1/C2
